# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/mu/IVG/ws_moveit/build_isolated/moveit_ros_planning_interface
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Builds the googlemock subproject
BUILD_GMOCK:BOOL=ON

//Build dynamically-linked binaries
BUILD_SHARED_LIBS:BOOL=ON

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Boost.
Boost_DIR:PATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/cmake/Boost-1.74.0

Boost_FILESYSTEM_LIBRARY_RELEASE:STRING=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.74.0

//Path to a file.

//Boost library directory DEBUG

//Boost python310 library (release)

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/addr2line

CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ar

// MinSizeRel ...

//Enable/Disable color output during build.

//CXX compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/c++

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ar-11

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib-11

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for tf2_eigen.
tf2_eigen_DIR:PATH=/home/mu/IVG/ws_moveit/install_isolated/share/tf2_eigen/cmake

tf2_geometry_msgs_DIR:PATH=/home/mu/IVG/ws_moveit/install_isolated/share/tf2_geometry_msgs/cmake

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for tf2_msgs.
tf2_msgs_DIR:PATH=/home/mu/IVG/ws_moveit/install_isolated/share/tf2_msgs/cmake

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for tf2_py.
tf2_py_DIR:PATH=/home/mu/IVG/ws_moveit/install_isolated/share/tf2_py/cmake

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for tf2_ros.
tf2_ros_DIR:PATH=/home/mu/IVG/ws_moveit/install_isolated/share/tf2_ros/cmake

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for tf.
tf_DIR:PATH=/home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/share/tf/cmake

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for trajectory_msgs.
trajectory_msgs_DIR:PATH=/home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/share/trajectory_msgs/cmake

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for urdf.
urdf_DIR:PATH=/home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/share/urdf/cmake

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for visualization_msgs.
visualization_msgs_DIR:PATH=/home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/share/visualization_msgs/cmake
